summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ThreatBase v2 AI-Enhanced Risk Management features (Phase 1 & 2). All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. AI Risk Analysis and Causal Intelligence panels are fully functional with GPT-5.2 integration.

issues: Threat title has accumulated test strings from previous test runs (UNDO_TEST_xxx) - cosmetic issue only

context_for_next_testing_agent: ThreatBase v2 AI features fully tested. Backend uses emergentintegrations for GPT-5.2 LLM calls. AI data is cached in MongoDB collections: ai_risk_insights, ai_causal_analysis, ai_fault_trees, ai_bow_ties, ai_action_optimization. Test threat ID 43455566-4f46-4c54-8130-fdd7a7d009a1 has cached AI analysis data. All AI endpoints require authentication. AI analysis can take 5-15 seconds to complete.

backend_apis.POST /api/ai/analyze-risk/{threat_id}: PASSED - Returns dynamic risk score, failure probability, time-to-failure, trend, forecasts
backend_apis.POST /api/ai/generate-causes/{threat_id}: PASSED - Returns probable causes ranked by likelihood
backend_apis.POST /api/ai/optimize-actions/{threat_id: PASSED - Returns action recommendations with ROI

frontend_ui.AI Risk Analysis Panel: PASSED - Shows risk score gauge (78), failure probability (62%), time-to-failure (3-7 days), trend (increasing +18), key risk factors, risk forecast chart, key insights, AI recommendations
frontend_ui.Causal Intelligence Panel: PASSED - Shows 5 probable causes ranked by likelihood, summary, supporting evidence, recommended mitigations
frontend_ui.Refresh buttons: PASSED - Both AI panels have working refresh buttons that trigger new AI analysis
frontend_ui.Panel expand/collapse: PASSED - Panels can be expanded and collapsed
frontend_ui.Threat Info Grid: PASSED - Shows asset, equipment type, failure mode, impact, frequency, likelihood, detectability, location
